  "findings": [
    "Non-plenum rated (riser) cable installed in an environmental air plenum space."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove the non-plenum (riser) cable from the plenum space.",
    "Replace with CMP (plenum-rated) cable as required by code."
  ],
  "rationale": "Installing riser-rated (CMR) cable in a plenum space violates fire safety codes because riser cable releases toxic smoke and spreads fire more rapidly than plenum-rated (CMP) cable when exposed to fire in an air-handling space.",

    "NEC Article 800",
    "NEC 300.22(C)",
    "TIA-568"
  ]
